539.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: checking if the next token is MAINTK assumes current token is 'int', but doesn't verify this. This can misidentify other constructs as MainFuncDef.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead logic: checking if the next token is MAINTK assumes current token is 'int', but doesn't verify this. This can misidentify other constructs as MainFuncDef.]

542.reason: [Incorrect lookahead logic: checking 2 tokens ahead for LPARENT to identify FuncDef is unreliable and doesn't properly distinguish between VarDecl and FuncDef when BType is followed by Ident.]
